steps.title: Expand the right side
steps.content:
Start with the given equation and distribute $N$.
$$PC=N(22-C)$$
$$PC=22N-NC$$

steps.title: Collect the C terms
steps.content:
Add $NC$ to both sides, then factor out $C$.
$$PC+NC=22N$$
$$C(P+N)=22N$$

steps.title: Solve for C
steps.content:
Divide by $P+N$.
$$C=\frac{22N}{P+N}$$
This is the same as $\frac{22N}{N+P}$. The answer is C.
